comment: Source of truth for the weekly Playbook routine. Weeks 1-5 send modules 1-5; every week after, a FRESH module is authored from the backlog (or from chatters' weakest exam areas once the backlog is empty), added here, then sent.
backlog: Shift Organization & Priorities — the priority hierarchy (spenders, new fans, regulars), pinning, 20-30 min rotation, start/mid-shift checklists, always-be-in-a-phase
Mass Messages That Convert — one per shift, question-first messages, planning the responses, exclusions, personalization at scale
Fan Notes & Memory Systems — what to log (job, pets, payday, kinks, milestones), nicknames done right, lists and segmentation, handover quality
Fan Types & Buyer Psychology — reading the whale, the regular, the window-shopper and the time-waster, and how attention allocation follows
PPV Pricing & Bundles — anchoring, laddering after a yes, bundle framing, when to hold price vs when to bonus
Boundaries & Time-Wasters — spotting sexting-for-free patterns, polite disengagement, protecting shift time without burning the fan
Compliance Deep Dive — platform rules refresher, chargeback discipline, meet-up requests, escalation to managers
Voice Mastery: Shantal — personal, elegant, first-names; drills and rewrites in her register
Voice Mastery: Karina — lowercase bratty done right; pet-name rules; drills and rewrites in her register
The VIP & SVIP Funnel — spotting mid-spenders ready to move up, protecting whales, making status feel real
